infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: We need the camera so you can record your golf swing.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: We need your photo library so you can pick a swing video to analyze.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Needed to record video with sound.

plugins.photosPermission: Let the app pick a golf swing video to analyze.
